Patch Set 1: Code-Review-1

I think we should hold off on landing this to b2_10 until we can figure out why conf-sanity test 32b is still failing on master after this patch has landed. See LU-9888.

Patch Set 1: Code-Review+1

This back ported patch does not remove test 32b from the ALWAYS_EXCEPT list as the original patch did. So, this one is safe to land to b2_10.

parents.subject: LU-9929 nodemap: add default ACL unmapping handling

commit.subject: LU-9826 test: Recreate disk2_7-zfs image to have a bigger file system
commit.message:
LU-9826 test: Recreate disk2_7-zfs image to have a bigger file system

Increase 2.7 zfs file system size and move conf_sanity
test_32b out of the ALWAYS_EXCEPT list

Test-Parameters: ostfilesystemtype=zfs mdtfilesystemtype=zfs \
testlist=conf-sanity

Lustre-change: https://review.whamcloud.com/28464
Lustre-commit: 6ab9866730c1bd2344869502586fc322f6ed7b71

Change-Id: I61e40bc495b06fcc73d4d6d5707433686984bcc7
Signed-off-by: Wei Liu <wei3.liu@intel.com>
Reviewed-by: James Nunez <james.a.nunez@intel.com>
Reviewed-by: Alex Zhuravlev <alexey.zhuravlev@intel.com>
Signed-off-by: Minh Diep <minh.diep@intel.com>
